    SELECT 1
    FROM core.units AS u2
    WHERE u2.parent_id = u.id)
FROM core.units AS u
LEFT JOIN core.units AS u0 ON u.parent_id = u0.id
LEFT JOIN core.units AS u1 ON u.assigned_unit_id = u1.id
LEFT JOIN dict.dict_forces_type AS d ON u.force_type_id = d.id
